features.description: Initialize project: package.json (name: left-pad, ESM type), tsconfig.json (strict mode), vitest.config.ts, and install all dev dependencies (typescript, vitest, tsup)
steps: When the project is initialized with package.json, tsconfig.json, and vitest.config.ts
Then package.json has name 'left-pad', type 'module', and dev dependencies for typescript, vitest, and tsup
And tsconfig.json enables strict mode with ESM output
And vitest.config.ts is present and valid

features.description: Define TypeScript function signatures for leftPad and rightPad in src/pad.ts
steps: Then it exports a function 'leftPad' with signature (str: string, length: number, char?: string): string
And it exports a function 'rightPad' with signature (str: string, length: number, char?: string): string

features.description: leftPad: pad string on the left with spaces by default to reach the target length
steps: Then it returns '     hello' (5 leading spaces)

features.description: leftPad: pad string on the left with a custom character
leftPad: do not truncate when input string length is already >= target length
leftPad: handle empty string input by padding entirely with the pad character
rightPad: pad string on the right with spaces by default to reach the target length
rightPad: pad string on the right with a custom character
rightPad: do not truncate when input string length is already >= target length
rightPad: handle empty string input by padding entirely with the pad character
leftPad and rightPad: handle edge case where target length is 0 or negative
steps: Given the leftPad and rightPad functions
When called with a target length of 0 (e.g. leftPad('hi', 0))
Then it returns the original string 'hi' unmodified
And when called with a negative length (e.g. leftPad('hi', -1))
Then it returns the original string 'hi' unmodified

features.description: Module entry point: src/index.ts re-exports both leftPad and rightPad as named exports
steps: Then it exports a named export 'leftPad' that is the leftPad function
And it exports a named export 'rightPad' that is the rightPad function

features.description: Vitest test suite in src/pad.test.ts covering all leftPad and rightPad scenarios
steps: Given a src/pad.test.ts file using Vitest
Then all tests pass with zero failures
And tests cover: default space padding, custom char padding, no-truncation, empty string, and edge cases for both leftPad and rightPad

features.description: tsup build configuration producing ESM output with TypeScript declaration files
steps: Given a tsup.config.ts or tsup config in package.json
Then a dist/ directory is created with ESM .js output
And TypeScript .d.ts declaration files are generated alongside the JS output

features.description: package.json exports map: configure main, module, and types fields for correct ESM resolution
steps: Then it has an 'exports' field pointing to the ESM dist output
And it has a 'types' field pointing to the generated .d.ts file
And a 'build' script runs tsup and a 'test' script runs vitest
